28355 N Fostoria Rd, Millbury, OH 43447, USA
Apple tree along Fostria road, enter parking lot and go left. Can easily access from parking lot. Tree seems healthy, lots of apples. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Neglected but bearing apple trees planted in the median. Grafted varieties, but mixed up with rootstock growing ornamental crabapples. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.
